## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run check` passes locally (typecheck + lint + format)
- [ ] `bun run build` succeeds
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or credentials committed
- [ ] Verified in the preview deployment
- [ ] Docs updated (README / CHANGELOG / runbook) where relevant
